title: Monday Music Mix #3
summary: As promised last time, here’s the third edition uploaded, much before end of the day.
intro: As promised last time, here’s the third edition uploaded, much before end of the day.
Grooveshark playlist will be up later - it’s not letting me upload the tracks that aren’t on it. Meanwhile you can directly stream the podcast by opening the link in your favourite MP3 player.
Links at the end of the post.
Send your love (if any) and feedback through the comments.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Third

As promised last time, here’s the third edition uploaded, much before end of the day.

Grooveshark playlist will be up later - it’s not letting me upload the tracks that aren’t on it. Meanwhile you can directly stream the podcast by opening the link in your favourite MP3 player.

Links at the end of the post.

Monday Music Mix: 03

Tracklist:

  1. Mickey Mickey Rourke - Gloomy Guts (Feat. Craft Spells)
  2. The Thrills - Midnight Choir
  3. Tapes ‘n Tapes - Omaha
  4. The Ordinary Boys - Lonely at the Top
  5. Noah And The Whale - 5 Years Time
  6. Kleerup - Until We Bleed (Feat. Lykke Li)
  7. Labyrinth Ear - White Gold

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download

Listen on Grooveshark

Send your love (if any) and feedback through the comments.
